Reply-To: From: "Sarah" Subject: Estate of (Ali Larijani): 92.4.163.49 Date: Tue, 2 Jun 2026 21:19:48 -0700 MIME-Version: 1.0 Content-Type: text/html; charset="Windows-1251" Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit X-Priority: 3 X-MSMail-Priority: Normal X-Mailer: Microsoft Outlook Express 6.00.2600.0000 X-MimeOLE: Produced By Microsoft MimeOLE V6.00.2600.0000
Estate of  (Ali Larijani) Vault Coordination Message.
 
I am writing to you regarding a private matter concerning the estate of my late husband who recently passed away in Iran.
 
Before his passing, he secured a significant family asset in a private security vault in Europe, managed through a designated investment
banker. Due to the current situation here, our family is unable to manage the release and subsequent reinvestment of these assets directly. We are seeking a principled and capable individual to assist with the transfer and the management of these funds within your country.
 
Furthermore, once the assets are positioned, we would require assistance in coordinating the necessary documentation for our relocation. If you are in a position to assist and can provide assurances of your discretion, we are prepared to discuss the specifics of this arrangement and the compensation for your partnership.
 
We look forward to your positive response.
 
Yours Faithfully,
 
Sara
